inputs.name: accessibleDescription
inputs.description: Defines the accessible ARIA description of the field.

inputs.name: accessibleName
inputs.description: Defines the accessible ARIA name of the component.

inputs.name: autoOpen
inputs.description: Indicates whether the suggestions popover should be opened on focus.

inputs.name: fieldLoading
inputs.description: Indicates whether a loading indicator should be shown in the input field.

inputs.name: loading
inputs.description: Indicates whether a loading indicator should be shown in the popup.

inputs.name: noTypeahead
inputs.description: Defines whether the value will be autcompleted to match an item.

inputs.name: open
inputs.description: Indicates whether the items picker is open.

inputs.name: placeholder
inputs.description:
Defines a short hint intended to aid the user with data entry when the
component has no value.

inputs.name: scopeValue
inputs.description:
Defines the value of the component:

Applications are responsible for setting the correct scope value.

*Note:** If the given value does not match any existing scopes,
no scope will be selected and the SearchField scope component will be displayed as empty.

inputs.name: showClearIcon
inputs.description: Defines whether the clear icon of the search will be shown.

inputs.name: value
inputs.description:
Defines the value of the component.

*Note:** The property is updated upon typing.

outputs.name: ui5Close
outputs.description: Fired when the popup is closed.

outputs.name: ui5Input
outputs.description: Fired when typing in input or clear icon is pressed.

outputs.name: ui5Open
outputs.description: Fired when the popup is opened.

outputs.name: ui5ScopeChange
outputs.description: Fired when the scope has changed.

outputs.name: ui5Search
outputs.description: Fired when the user has triggered search with Enter key or Search Button press.
